---
applyTo: "test/**,tests/**,spec/**,src/test/**,**/*test.*,**/*Test.*,**/*spec.*"
---

# Testing Quality

Follow `ai/workflows/testing-quality.md` when creating, editing, or reviewing tests.

Start from the project wiki and existing test patterns. Write tests that can catch real bugs and edge cases. Do not add trivial tests that only verify language or framework behavior.
